title: Does anyone know what this Evangelion music is
display_title: Does anyone know what this Evangelion music is
wikitext:
[]: Does anyone know what this Evangelion music is? Post by xPearse » Fri Mar 27, 2015 12:54 pm I know it must be public domain because I heard it on BON TV the other day. Its used in some of the funny moments of Evangelion if I remember correctly. So, does anyone know what this music is called? https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B_AjP6P6CYAIV1BvbTUydFFEXzA/view?usp=sharing

[]: Post by pwhodges » Fri Mar 27, 2015 2:37 pm It's Shiro Sagisu's track called "Misato", and is on the first OST and the second disk of S2 Works in that scoring. Saying it must be public domain because you heard it on TV is naive. It is, I agree, absolutely delightful.

[]: Post by xPearse » Fri Mar 27, 2015 4:23 pm pwhodges wrote: It's Shiro Sagisu's track called "Misato", and is on the first OST and the second disk of S2 Works in that scoring. Saying it must be public domain because you heard it on TV is naive. It is, I agree, absolutely delightful.

[]: Post by robersora » Fri Mar 27, 2015 4:30 pm Now I'm really curious in what context the channel used Sagisu's music.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Mar 27, 2015 4:35 pm The confusion of International Copyright Laws, the Fair Use, and the obscurity of the channel is probably what made something like this possible.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 27, 2015 4:40 pm OP's question has been addressed.
